section.div: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.
A jq-like Markdown query language for command-line processing
A rate limiter for Starlette and FastAPI
Next Generation Server Toolkit. Create web servers with everything you need and deploy them wherever you prefer.
